premise: A five-card family montage traces the narrator from mother and father to love story, childhood, and present-day self.

cast.description: Appears in the beach photo and the couple photo.
Appears in the solo father portrait and the couple photo.
Appears in the gym selfie finale.

continuity_rules: This package tells a family lineage arc, not a single-scene fashion remake, so each archival card should preserve its own photographic era and environment.
Each label should remain editable Shotstack text with simple white fill and black stroke only; do not invent text backdrops.
Watermark and username UI are source platform elements and should be ignored by default.
Santa is contextual to the childhood photo only and should not be treated as a recurring character.

supporting_character_policy.rationale: Only family-arc subjects matter; extra archival people such as Santa are contextual.

scene_arc.beat: Show the parents together falling in love.
Resolve with the present-day self card.
